column3: Celery Juice is the extract obtained from the celery vegetable, which has been liquefied and filtered into a refreshing drink that can be consumed on its own or incorporated into various recipes for added health benefits.
Celery Seed Powder is finely ground, dried and pulverized celery seeds that are used as a food supplement and for its numerous health benefits due to high antioxidant content and valuable minerals.

Celery Essential Oil is derived from the seeds or leaves of the celery plant, and has a variety of uses including aromatherapy, culinary purposes, and even in skincare due to its beneficial properties.
Celery Tea is a herbal beverage primarily prepared from the dried or fresh leaves of celery plants, steeped and consumed for its unique flavour and potential health benefits.

Celery Root Extract is an ingredient derived from the root part of a celery plant, which has been concentrated into an essence and used for its medicinal properties and as a culinary enhancer, providing a rich source of vitamins and minerals.

Celery Fresh Root is a term used to describe the edible, green and leafy part of the celery plant which has been harvested at its youthful stage when it still possesses a crisp texture and mildly bitter flavor characteristic of fresh produce.
Celery Dried Root is a form of celery that has been dehydrated, retaining its unique flavour and nutritional properties, while offering an extended shelf life compared to fresh celery.

Celery Stem Extract is a concentrated form of the nutritious and health-benefiting compounds found within the stalks of celery plants, which are obtained through an extraction process that isolates and preserves their valuable properties.
Celery Leaf Extract is an herbal supplement made from finely chopped celery leaves that retain a variety of nutrients and have potential health benefits when consumed.

Celery Fluid Extract is a concentrated solution obtained by distilling and evaporating celery leaves, which retains their medicinal properties that are used for various health benefits such as detoxification, aiding digestion, and promoting weight loss.
